blockingIssues.description: PO lifecycle implementation does not satisfy declared full lifecycle contract: create flow writes APPROVED directly and there are no API/service transitions to realize DRAFT or VOID runtime states.
Purchasing workflow controller exposes only PO create/list/get endpoints, so required explicit lifecycle transition operations are missing for full contract coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a documented fallback review path when Task subagent spawning fails (for example due to invalid/obsolete mission worker model configuration), so scrutiny runs can still complete deterministically.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All Task launches for this milestone failed with 'Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.3-codex-xhigh-pro', requiring manual in-session review artifact creation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Refresh baseline gate-fast test count guidance to match current suite totals and avoid stale expected-count references in handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS baseline section references 369 tests while current gate-fast run in this scrutiny session reported 378 passing tests.

rejectedObservations.observation: Task-subagent spawning failed because of invalid mission model alias (duplicate report)
